pages.raw_text:
Many of the train crews Of the
Northern Pacific company are com
mencing to assert themselves and are
raising a large kick about the new
division limits which went into effect
last fall. An effort will be made by
the men to obtain the old limits back
again. These extended from Spokane
to Missoula, Mont, while the new
limits extend from Spokane to Trout
Creek, Idaho.


When it was decided to make Trout
Creek a divisional point that little burS
at once sprang into prominence, but
after a trial of the new division for
several months the men claim that all
arrangements are not working to the
satisfaction of anyone. The officials
may not give the protests of the men
very much consideration, but it is also
said that they are not well satisfied
with the new arrangements them
selves and the change may be made.
